arts.ttl: Paul Scholes reveals how blazing row with Sir Alex Ferguson almost ended Man Utd career
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson and Paul Scholes had a huge row after a defeat in 2001 that left the England international concerned that his Manchester United career was over

arts.ttl: Man Utd send Varane heartwarming retirement message
arts.sum: Manchester United have sent a message of thanks to Raphael Varane following the decision of the former Red Devil to hang up his boots. On their social channels, Man Utd paid tribute to the 31-year-old, who also represented Lens and Real Madrid during an illustrious career.

arts.ttl: Scholes Says Rashford 'Has Been up to Something' at Man Utd
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford wasn't selected to start for Manchester United vs Crystal Palace and Paul Scholes believes there is something bigger at play

arts.ttl: Scholes Says Rashford 'Has Been up to Something' at Man Utd
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford wasn't selected to start for Manchester United vs Crystal Palace and Paul Scholes believes there is something bigger at play

arts.ttl: Steve McClaren insists Erik ten Hag was RIGHT to take on Cristiano Ronaldo, as he praises the Man United boss for 'sticking to his guns' amid the Portuguese superstar's explosive departure from Old Trafford
arts.sum: McClaren returned to Old Trafford for his second spell at United in 2022 to work alongside Ten Hag and oversaw the Dutchman's relationship with Ronaldo.

arts.ttl: Ronaldo Man Utd exit: Huge secret revealed by club insider
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo’s departure from Manchester United was a victory for the philosophy of manager Erik ten Hag, according to Steve McClaren, who acted as the Dutchman’s right-hand man for a period at Old Trafford. Ronaldo has been told that he failed to come up to Ten Hag’s standards while at Man Utd – and that his exit was the best thing for the club.

arts.ttl: “I was in talks…” – new Man United addition reveals Ten Hag’s crucial role in surprise Old Trafford move
arts.sum: Manchester United coach Ruud van Nistelrooy has revealed he was planning for another managerial role and talking with other clubs before receiving a call from Erik ten Hag to make a surprise return to Old Trafford. arts.ttl: Manchester United confirm squad for Europa League fixture as youngster included
arts.sum: Man Utd are in action against FC Twente in the Europa League on Wednesday and their squad has been confirmed.

arts.ttl: 'I'm a Man Utd legend – I think Liverpool will have something to say in the title race'
arts.sum: Liverpool's untimely slip-up against Nottingham Forest raised slight doubts over their title-challenging capabilities this season, but one of their rivals' all-time greats still thinks they have a shout

arts.ttl: Raphael Varane retires: Former Real Madrid and Manchester United defender calls time on playing career
arts.sum: One of the most decorated defenders in the game
